user_message: set up a three-point studio lighting for a portrait

spec.subject: a studio portrait subject (implied human bust/head) under classic three-point lighting

lighting.key: warm-neutral area light at 45° camera-left and 45° above subject, 5500K, full intensity, soft large source (~0.6m²) to wrap slightly without losing shape
lighting.fill: cool-tinted area light at 30° camera-right, 7000K, 0.4× key intensity, positioned at face height to reduce harsh shadow depth without flattening form
lighting.rim: backlight placed directly behind-right of subject, 6000K, 0.6× key intensity, narrow strip light to create edge separation from background and add depth
lighting.mood: intimate and polished — classic Rembrandt-adjacent drama without being ominous; clean and professional

palette.neutral: medium dark grey seamless background, approximately #2A2A2A

composition.foreground: shallow empty space between camera and subject — no foreground clutter
composition.midground: portrait subject centered with slight offset toward camera-right to complement key light direction
composition.background: seamless dark grey studio backdrop, soft and out of focus to isolate subject
composition.hero: the lit side of the subject's face — the key-lit cheek and eye catch

materials.notes: roughness 1.0, no specularity, very dark grey base color (~0.06 value), slight vignette falloff toward edges via light placement
area light ~0.6m × 0.6m, positioned 1.2m from subject, 5500K, shadows soft
area light ~0.4m × 0.4m, positioned 1.5m from subject, 7000K, intensity 40% of key
area light ~0.2m × 0.8m, positioned 0.9m behind-right of subject at head height, 6000K, intensity 60% of key

density.scattered: none — clean studio environment, no scattered elements

spec.scale_notes: Portrait subject (head/bust stand-in) approximately 1.7m tall total; camera placed ~1.8m from subject. Key light at ~1.2m lateral offset and 1.0m above eye level. Rim light ~0.8m behind subject. Entire scene footprint roughly 3m × 3m. Current scene Cube can serve as subject placeholder at 1.7m scale.
